title: AgentOffer Offer Conversion Goals v0.2 Draft
description: Non-GA draft overlay expressing conversion goals on an AgentOffer offer. A goal is the recognized occurrence of an event priced by a cpa or cps pricing object. The active v0.1 offer-schema-v0.1.json remains the GA contract and is not modified by this draft.

goals.description: Conversion goals. goals[].event values must be unique within one offer (exact string comparison). Array order carries no semantics.

event.description: Semantic identity and reference key of the goal, unique within the offer. Changing event replaces the goal. Cross-message references use (offer_id, event).

pricing.description: Price paid for one recognized occurrence of event.

amount.description: Positive decimal string; MUST be greater than zero (enforced by validators; the pattern alone admits zero). Exact passthrough, at most 12 integer and 6 fractional digits.

rate.description: Percentage of conversion value: positive decimal string, MUST be greater than zero, at most 4 fractional digits, structurally capped at 100. A ratio carries no currency.

description.description: Advisory human-readable note. Consumers MUST NOT derive billing, matching, or settlement behavior from it.
